Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 #ifndef VECTOR3_H
00002 #define VECTOR3_H
00003 
00004 
00005 
00006 #include <math.h>
00007 #include <stdlib.h>
00008 #include <assert.h>
00009 #include <iostream.h>
00010 #include <iomanip.h>
00011 
00012 
00014 
00015 
00016 class Vector3  {
00017 public:
00018     
00019     Vector3() { e[0] = 0; e[1] = 0; e[2] = 0;}
00020     Vector3(float e0, float e1, float e2) {e[0]=e0; e[1]=e1; e[2]=e2;}
00021     float x() const { return e[0]; }
00022     float y() const { return e[1]; }
00023     float z() const { return e[2]; }
00024     void setX(float a) { e[0] = a; }
00025     void setY(float a) { e[1] = a; }
00026     void setZ(float a) { e[2] = a; }
00027 
00028     inline Vector3(const Vector3 &v) {
00029          e[0] = v.e[0]; e[1] = v.e[1]; e[2] = v.e[2];
00030     }
00031 
00032     const Vector3& operator+() const { return *this; }
00033     Vector3 operator-() const { return Vector3(-e[0], -e[1], -e[2]); }
00034     float& operator[](int i) {  return e[i]; }
00035     float operator[](int i) const { return e[i];}
00036 
00037     Vector3& operator+=(const Vector3 &v2);
00038     Vector3& operator-=(const Vector3 &v2);
00039     Vector3& operator*=(const float t);
00040     Vector3& operator/=(const float t);
00041 
00042 
00043     
00044     float length() const { return sqrt(e[0]*e[0] + e[1]*e[1] + e[2]*e[2]); }
00045     float squaredLength() const { return e[0]*e[0] + e[1]*e[1] + e[2]*e[2]; }
00046 
00047     void makeUnitVector();
00048 
00049     
00050     float minComponent() const { return e[indexOfMinComponent()]; }
00051     float maxComponent() const { return e[indexOfMaxComponent()]; }
00052     float maxAbsComponent() const { return e[indexOfMaxAbsComponent()]; }
00053     float minAbsComponent() const { return e[indexOfMinAbsComponent()]; }
00054     int indexOfMinComponent() const { 
00055         return (e[0]< e[1] && e[0]< e[2]) ? 0 : (e[1] < e[2] ? 1 : 2);
00056     }
00057 
00058     int indexOfMinAbsComponent() const {
00059         if (fabs(e[0]) < fabs(e[1]) && fabs(e[0]) < fabs(e[2]))
00060             return 0;
00061         else if (fabs(e[1]) < fabs(e[2]))
00062             return 1;
00063         else
00064             return 2;
00065     }
00066 
00067     int indexOfMaxComponent() const {
00068         return (e[0]> e[1] && e[0]> e[2]) ? 0 : (e[1] > e[2] ? 1 : 2);
00069     }
00070 
00071     int indexOfMaxAbsComponent() const {
00072         if (fabs(e[0]) > fabs(e[1]) && fabs(e[0]) > fabs(e[2]))
00073             return 0;
00074         else if (fabs(e[1]) > fabs(e[2]))
00075             return 1;
00076         else
00077             return 2;
00078     }
00079 
00080     float e[3];
00081 };
00082 
00083 
00084 inline bool operator==(const Vector3 &t1, const Vector3 &t2) {
00085    return ((t1[0]==t2[0])&&(t1[1]==t2[1])&&(t1[2]==t2[2]));
00086 }
00087 
00088 inline bool operator!=(const Vector3 &t1, const Vector3 &t2) {
00089    return ((t1[0]!=t2[0])||(t1[1]!=t2[1])||(t1[2]!=t2[2]));
00090 }
00091 
00092 inline istream &operator>>(istream &is, Vector3 &t) {
00093    is >> t[0] >> t[1] >> t[2];
00094    return is;
00095 }
00096 
00097 inline ostream &operator<<(ostream &os, const Vector3 &t) {
00098    os << t[0] << " " << t[1] << " " << t[2];
00099    return os;
00100 }
00101 
00102 inline Vector3 unitVector(const Vector3& v) {
00103     float k = 1.0f / sqrt(v.e[0]*v.e[0] + v.e[1]*v.e[1] + v.e[2]*v.e[2]);
00104     return Vector3(v.e[0]*k, v.e[1]*k, v.e[2]*k);
00105 }
00106 
00107 inline void Vector3::makeUnitVector() {
00108     float k = 1.0f / sqrt(e[0]*e[0] + e[1]*e[1] + e[2]*e[2]);
00109     e[0] *= k; e[1] *= k; e[2] *= k;
00110 }
00111 
00112 inline Vector3 operator+(const Vector3 &v1, const Vector3 &v2) {
00113     return Vector3( v1.e[0] + v2.e[0], v1.e[1] + v2.e[1], v1.e[2] + v2.e[2]);
00114 }
00115 
00116 inline Vector3 operator-(const Vector3 &v1, const Vector3 &v2) {
00117     return Vector3( v1.e[0] - v2.e[0], v1.e[1] - v2.e[1], v1.e[2] - v2.e[2]);
00118 }
00119 
00120 inline Vector3 operator*(float t, const Vector3 &v) {
00121     return Vector3(t*v.e[0], t*v.e[1], t*v.e[2]); 
00122 }
00123 
00124 inline Vector3 operator*(const Vector3 &v, float t) {
00125     return Vector3(t*v.e[0], t*v.e[1], t*v.e[2]); 
00126 }
00127 
00128 inline Vector3 operator/(const Vector3 &v, float t) {
00129     return Vector3(v.e[0]/t, v.e[1]/t, v.e[2]/t); 
00130 }
00131 
00132 
00133 inline float dot(const Vector3 &v1, const Vector3 &v2) {
00134     return v1.e[0] *v2.e[0] + v1.e[1] *v2.e[1]  + v1.e[2] *v2.e[2];
00135 }
00136 
00137 inline Vector3 cross(const Vector3 &v1, const Vector3 &v2) {
00138     return Vector3( (v1.e[1]*v2.e[2] - v1.e[2]*v2.e[1]),
00139                       (v1.e[2]*v2.e[0] - v1.e[0]*v2.e[2]),
00140                       (v1.e[0]*v2.e[1] - v1.e[1]*v2.e[0]));
00141 }
00142 
00143 
00144 inline Vector3& Vector3::operator+=(const Vector3 &v){
00145     e[0]  += v.e[0];
00146     e[1]  += v.e[1];
00147     e[2]  += v.e[2];
00148     return *this;
00149 }
00150 
00151 inline Vector3& Vector3::operator-=(const Vector3& v) {
00152     e[0]  -= v.e[0];
00153     e[1]  -= v.e[1];
00154     e[2]  -= v.e[2];
00155     return *this;
00156 }
00157 
00158 inline Vector3& Vector3::operator*=(const float t) {
00159     e[0]  *= t;
00160     e[1]  *= t;
00161     e[2]  *= t;
00162     return *this;
00163 }
00164 
00165 inline Vector3& Vector3::operator/=(const float t) {
00166     e[0]  /= t;
00167     e[1]  /= t;
00168     e[2]  /= t;
00169     return *this;
00170 }
00171 
00172 inline
00173 Vector3 reflect(const Vector3& in, const Vector3& normal)
00174 {
00175   // assumes unit length normal
00176   return in - normal * (2 * dot(in, normal));
00177 }
00178 
00179 
00180 #endif
